2024 SUBARU OUTBACK REAR QUARTER PANEL REPLACEMENT
ALLDATA Collision Repair Procedures

Vehicle: 2024 Subaru Outback 2.5i Premium AWD
Operation: Rear Side Outer Panel / Quarter Panel Replacement
Document Type: Repair Procedure
System Note: ALLDATA Collision repair information system serves multiple OEM platforms
including Toyota, Honda, Volkswagen, and others. Verify this procedure applies to
your specific vehicle before beginning repair.

DESCRIPTION
The 2024 Subaru Outback uses high-strength steel panels in the rear quarter area.
This procedure covers removal and installation of the rear side outer panel on
the 2024 Subaru Outback. Follow all steps in order.

REQUIRED TOOLS
- MIG welder rated for Subaru-approved wire specification
- Panel removal tools
- Spot weld drill bit
- Body hammer set

PREPARATION
Verify vehicle identification: 2024 Subaru Outback. Review all applicable Subaru
technical service bulletins before beginning. Subaru Corporation specifies the
following panel attachment method for the Outback rear quarter panel.

REMOVAL PROCEDURE
Step 1. Disconnect the negative battery terminal.
Step 2. Remove all trim panels adjacent to the rear quarter panel area.
Step 3. Drill out factory spot welds per Subaru weld location diagram.
Step 4. Remove the rear side outer panel from the vehicle.
Step 5. Clean all flanges to bare metal per Subaru anti-corrosion requirements.

INSTALLATION PROCEDURE
Step 6. Prepare replacement panel per Subaru panel preparation guidelines.
Step 7. Apply anti-corrosion primer to all bare metal areas.
Step 8. Position new panel. Verify fit per 2024 Subaru Outback gap specifications.
Step 9. Weld panel per Subaru joining method specification.
Step 10. Apply sealer per Subaru corrosion protection requirements.
Step 11. Apply final corrosion protection and refinish per Subaru paint specification.

POST-INSTALLATION
Verify panel alignment meets 2024 Subaru Outback factory gap and flush specifications.
Inspect all weld locations for completeness per Subaru quality standards.
Apply cavity wax per Subaru corrosion protection requirements.
